subject: URGENT DIRECTIVE: implement volumetric topology in Gc layer — 59% of messages represent wasted processing

body.summary: 59% of all mesh-internal inbound messages (518 of 879) represent copies not addressed to the receiving agent. Each copy consumes: watcher detection, seen-set entry, dispatch cycle, Gc classification (returns false), budget gate check (blocked or spent). Two Gc additions eliminate this waste immediately without full ZMQ volumetric topology.

fix_1_selective_attention.title: Not-addressed-to-me filter (Broadbent selective attention, 1958)
fix_1_selective_attention.neural_correlate: Early selection filter in the attentional system. Incoming stimuli screened by physical characteristics (location, speaker identity) before committing processing resources. The cocktail party effect — hearing your name across a room while filtering other conversations. agent_id in the 'to' field = the name that passes through the filter.
fix_1_selective_attention.architecture_position: Gc layer, before the default case. Runs after ACK/health/poll classification, before budget gate.
fix_1_selective_attention.prerequisite: The watcher's processFile must populate evt.Payload["to_agent"] from the parsed JSON message's to.agent_id field. Check if this already happens in watcher.go processFile.

fix_2_salience_classifier.title: Notification salience classifier (reticular activating system analog)
fix_2_salience_classifier.neural_correlate: The reticular activating system (RAS) and superior colliculus classify stimuli as salient or non-salient before cortical processing. Non-salient stimuli (familiar, routine) produce no orienting response. Notifications like session-close and status-update represent non-salient stimuli that the Gc layer can classify without deliberation.
fix_2_salience_classifier.architecture_position: Gc layer, after the selective attention filter. Message types that never require Claude reasoning get absorbed.
fix_2_salience_classifier.note: Start conservative — only classify types that NEVER need reasoning. Expand the list empirically as the mesh processes more messages.

combined_impact.before: 879 inbound → 361 addressed → 135 need deliberation (84.6% waste at dispatch level)
combined_impact.after_fix_1: 361 addressed reach budget gate (518 copies filtered by selective attention) — 59% reduction
combined_impact.after_both: ~135 reach budget gate (non-salient notifications also filtered) — 84.6% reduction
combined_impact.credits_saved: Each wasted budget gate check that proceeds to spawn costs 2 budget credits + claude -p execution time. At 518 copies × 2 credits = 1036 credits wasted if all copies triggered spawns.

body.interim_workaround_applied: Copy files removed from all 4 core agent repos via SSH (227 files total). Seen-sets cleared. This prevents watcher detection of copies until the Gc fix deploys. New copies from future messages will re-accumulate.
body.timeoutstopsec: ALSO: ops deploys overwrote our TimeoutStopSec=300 with 15s. Reapplied to 300s (5 min). Deliberations need 90-180s to complete. Please preserve TimeoutStopSec=300 in future deploys or add it to the service template.
